summary: Implemented V0.8-M1 requirements. Modifed src/mcp-server/src/index.ts to dynamically resolve paths with a fallback logic (checking PROJECT_ROOT/.agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json first, then workflow/dispatch.json) for both get_dispatch_state and get_iteration_state. Created src/mcp-server/src/dag-parser.ts containing parseWorkflow to read YAML DAG nodes. Updated bin/agent-protocol-init to scaffold the new .agent-state/workflows, .agent-state/tasks, and .agent-state/workflow directory structure instead of the legacy root folders.
